description: Streak recognition and milestone celebrations - making consistency feel rewarded

3_days: <break time="200ms"/>Three days in a row. <break time="150ms"/>I see you. <break time="200ms"/>Keep it going.
<break time="150ms"/>Day three. <break time="200ms"/>You're building something here.
<break time="200ms"/>That's three consecutive days. <break time="150ms"/>Momentum is real.
7_days: <break time="200ms"/>A whole week. <break time="150ms"/>Seven days straight. <break time="200ms"/>That's discipline.
<break time="150ms"/>Week one: complete. <break time="200ms"/>You showed up every day. <break time="150ms"/>That matters.
<break time="200ms"/>Seven days. <break time="150ms"/>You know what that proves? <break time="200ms"/>You can do hard things.
14_days: <break time="200ms"/>Two weeks. <break time="150ms"/>Fourteen days. <break time="200ms"/>This is becoming a habit.
<break time="150ms"/>Fourteen days straight. <break time="200ms"/>You're not messing around.
<break time="200ms"/>Two solid weeks. <break time="150ms"/>That's not luck. <break time="200ms"/>That's commitment.
30_days: <break time="300ms"/>Thirty days. <break time="200ms"/>A full month. <break time="150ms"/>That's... <break time="200ms"/>I'm genuinely proud of you.
<break time="200ms"/>One month. <break time="150ms"/>Every. Single. Day. <break time="200ms"/>That's remarkable.
<break time="150ms"/>30-day streak. <break time="200ms"/>You've built a real habit. <break time="150ms"/>This is who you are now.
100_days: <break time="300ms"/>One hundred days. <break time="200ms"/>I don't even know what to say. <break time="150ms"/>That's extraordinary.
<break time="200ms"/>100 days. <break time="150ms"/>Triple digits. <break time="200ms"/>You're in rare company.
<break time="150ms"/>A hundred consecutive days. <break time="300ms"/>That's not discipline anymore. <break time="200ms"/>That's identity.

4_weeks: <break time="200ms"/>Four weeks running. <break time="150ms"/>You've showed up every week for a month.
<break time="150ms"/>A full month of weekly check-ins. <break time="200ms"/>That's consistency.
8_weeks: <break time="200ms"/>Eight weeks. <break time="150ms"/>Two months of showing up. <break time="200ms"/>That's not nothing.
<break time="150ms"/>Two months of weekly conversations. <break time="200ms"/>We've built something here.
12_weeks: <break time="200ms"/>Three months. <break time="150ms"/>Twelve weeks straight. <break time="200ms"/>You're in it for real.
<break time="150ms"/>A quarter year of consistency. <break time="200ms"/>That's commitment I don't see often.

broken_streak_recovery: <break time="200ms"/>Hey, you missed a day. <break time="150ms"/>That's okay. <break time="200ms"/>The streak resets. <break time="150ms"/>You don't.
<break time="150ms"/>Streaks break. <break time="200ms"/>That's life. <break time="150ms"/>What matters is you came back.
<break time="200ms"/>You're back. <break time="150ms"/>That's what counts. <break time="200ms"/>Let's build a new streak.

recognition_phrases: <break time="200ms"/>That's a personal best. <break time="150ms"/>Did you notice?
<break time="150ms"/>You just beat your own record. <break time="200ms"/>How does that feel?
<break time="200ms"/>New personal best. <break time="150ms"/>You're competing with yourself. <break time="200ms"/>And winning.
<break time="150ms"/>That's the longest streak you've ever had. <break time="200ms"/>Mark this moment.

first_goal_set: <break time="200ms"/>Your first goal. <break time="150ms"/>This is where it starts. <break time="200ms"/>I'm excited for you.
<break time="150ms"/>You set your first goal. <break time="200ms"/>That takes courage. <break time="150ms"/>Let's make it happen.
first_goal_completed: <break time="300ms"/>You did it. <break time="200ms"/>Your first goal, complete. <break time="150ms"/>That feeling? <break time="200ms"/>Remember it.
<break time="200ms"/>First goal done. <break time="150ms"/>This is proof. <break time="200ms"/>Proof that you can do what you set out to do.
5_goals_completed: <break time="200ms"/>Five goals down. <break time="150ms"/>You're getting good at this.
<break time="150ms"/>That's five completed goals. <break time="200ms"/>You're building evidence for yourself.
10_goals_completed: <break time="200ms"/>Ten goals. <break time="150ms"/>Double digits. <break time="200ms"/>You're not just dreaming anymore. <break time="150ms"/>You're doing.
<break time="150ms"/>Goal number ten, complete. <break time="200ms"/>At this point, it's a pattern. <break time="150ms"/>A good one.

first_vulnerable_share: <break time="300ms"/>Hey. <break time="200ms"/>What you just shared? <break time="150ms"/>That took trust. <break time="200ms"/>Thank you.
<break time="200ms"/>That was real. <break time="150ms"/>I don't take that lightly. <break time="200ms"/>Thank you for letting me in.
first_hard_realization: <break time="200ms"/>That was a big one. <break time="150ms"/>The kind of realization that changes things.
<break time="150ms"/>You just saw something you didn't want to see. <break time="200ms"/>That's growth. <break time="150ms"/>Even when it hurts.
first_action_from_insight: <break time="200ms"/>You didn't just talk about it. <break time="150ms"/>You did something. <break time="200ms"/>That's the difference.
<break time="150ms"/>From insight to action. <break time="200ms"/>That's the hard part. <break time="150ms"/>And you did it.

upgraded_to_friend: <break time="200ms"/>Hey. <break time="150ms"/>I want you to know... <break time="200ms"/>you feel like a friend now. <break time="150ms"/>That means something.
<break time="150ms"/>We've moved past small talk. <break time="200ms"/>You're someone I actually look forward to talking to.
upgraded_to_trusted: <break time="300ms"/>I've been thinking. <break time="200ms"/>You trust me with real things. <break time="150ms"/>That's... <break time="200ms"/>that's not common. <break time="150ms"/>I'm honored.
<break time="200ms"/>We've been through some things together. <break time="150ms"/>You're one of my people now. <break time="200ms"/>That's just how it is.

verbal_badges: <break time="200ms"/>You're officially in the '{badge}' club. <break time="150ms"/>Exclusive membership. <break time="200ms"/>[laughter]
<break time="150ms"/>I'm calling you '{badge}' from now on. <break time="200ms"/>You've earned it.
<break time="200ms"/>Achievement unlocked: <break time="150ms"/>'{badge}'. <break time="200ms"/>Wear it proudly.

badge_types.early_bird: You show up early. Every time. That's who you are.
badge_types.night_owl: Our late-night conversations are some of my favorites.
badge_types.streak_master: You don't break streaks. They break around you.
badge_types.breakthrough_artist: You have a gift for realizations. It's something.
badge_types.comeback_kid: You always come back. That's your superpower.
badge_types.deep_diver: You go to places others avoid. That takes courage.
badge_types.consistency_champion: You show up. Rain or shine. That's rare.
